title: Northwestern University AI Policy Staged Crawl Report
summary: Staged crawl of Northwestern University AI policies identified 6 verified official sources covering university-wide GenAI guidance, approved tools (Microsoft Copilot), instructor course policy options (Open/Conditional/Closed), academic integrity rules, data classification/privacy requirements, and student learning resources. 11 candidate sources were rejected as campus-specific, news-only, research showcases, or generic hub pages. 6 policy claims were extracted covering academic integrity, teaching policy options, approved AI tools, data protection requirements, and data classification levels.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
